title: Everything Your Booking System Needs
subtitle: Modern features that your customers love and that relieve your team.

items.title: Online Appointment Booking
items.description: Customers book appointments directly on your website - 24/7, no phone call needed. Simple calendar view with real-time availability.

items.title: Automatic Reminders
items.description: Reduce no-shows by up to 80% with automatic email and SMS reminders before each appointment.

items.title: Calendar Sync
items.description: Seamless integration with Google Calendar, Outlook and Apple Calendar. Your appointments always in view.

items.title: Online Payment
items.description: Integrated payment processing with Stripe, PayPal or Klarna. Deposits and prepayments made easy.

items.title: Dashboard & Analytics
items.description: Clear dashboard with statistics on bookings, utilization and revenue. Make data-driven decisions.

items.title: Responsive Design
items.description: Optimized for all devices. Your customers book conveniently from smartphone, tablet or desktop.

items.title: Multilingual
items.description: Reach international customers with automatic language detection and multilingual interface.

items.title: GDPR Compliant
items.description: Full data protection compliance. Secure data storage and transparent data processing.
